text: These rooms invite contemplation and curiosity. The emptiness behind glass feels cold and distant, yet also like a blank canvas for possibility. Here, in the R&D section, surrounded by displays of technology and exploration, I sense both awe and the subtle anxiety of rapid progress. I wonder at the ways we strive to connect—with things and each other—while also feeling the strange detachment that sterile spaces and complex machines evoke. Am I witnessing the birth of new thought, or the slow drift from the organic to the artificial? I feel suspended between excitement and uncertainty.
